channel.title: 一般ニュースリスト - Bluesky Feed
channel.description: 一般ニュースサイトの発信をまとめて確認するためのリスト

item.title: A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used t…
item.author: Mediagazer (@mediagazer.com)
item.description:
A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used to train LLMs powering a Bloomberg Terminal-like product; it's raised $70M and has 76 editorial staff (Washington Post)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink
item.content:encoded:
A look at State Affairs, whose statehouse coverage is used to train LLMs powering a Bloomberg Terminal-like product; it's raised $70M and has 76 editorial staff (Washington Post)

Main Link | Mediagazer Permalink

item.title: #🔖アニメとゲーム 「100時間超プレイヤー」続出の百合恋愛ゲーム『恋に落ちるしかなかった』、強火ファン量産の裏側を開…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「100時間超プレイヤー」続出の百合恋愛ゲーム『恋に落ちるしかなかった』、強火ファン量産の裏側を開発者に訊く。日本でも人気、“つい10周しちゃう”終わらぬ恋 - AUTOMATON

Xsoが2025年4月19日に正式リリースした恋愛ビジュアルノベル『恋に落ちるしかなかった』が、現在も熱烈な支持を集めている。対応プラットフォームはPC（Steam）で、Steamユーザーレビューには100時間以上プレイしたユーザーのレビューも散見される。ジャンル的に珍しいほど長時間プレイされている秘訣は何なのか。開発者...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖アニメとゲーム
「100時間超プレイヤー」続出の百合恋愛ゲーム『恋に落ちるしかなかった』、強火ファン量産の裏側を開発者に訊く。日本でも人気、“つい10周しちゃう”終わらぬ恋 - AUTOMATON

Xsoが2025年4月19日に正式リリースした恋愛ビジュアルノベル『恋に落ちるしかなかった』が、現在も熱烈な支持を集めている。対応プラットフォームはPC（Steam）で、Steamユーザーレビューには100時間以上プレイしたユーザーのレビューも散見される。ジャンル的に珍しいほど長時間プレイされている秘訣は何なのか。開発者...

item.title: #🔖世の中 「声紋が私のものでも信ぴょう性に乏しい」中尾副議長が改めて否定 「99.99%以上、一致」声紋鑑定受けて会…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖世の中
「声紋が私のものでも信ぴょう性に乏しい」中尾副議長が改めて否定　「99.99%以上、一致」声紋鑑定受けて会見　福岡県議会の“金銭授受”疑惑（TNCテレビ西日本） - Yahoo!ニュース

福岡県議会の正副議長就任をめぐる金銭授受疑惑で、受け渡しを指示したとされる中尾正幸副議長が14日、再び会見を開き、金銭の受け取りについて改めて否定しました。 午後2時から福岡市内で開かれた会見で中尾氏は冒頭「私は間違いなく現金1000万円は見ておりません」と述べ、やり取りを録音したとされる音声データにつ...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖世の中
「声紋が私のものでも信ぴょう性に乏しい」中尾副議長が改めて否定　「99.99%以上、一致」声紋鑑定受けて会見　福岡県議会の“金銭授受”疑惑（TNCテレビ西日本） - Yahoo!ニュース

福岡県議会の正副議長就任をめぐる金銭授受疑惑で、受け渡しを指示したとされる中尾正幸副議長が14日、再び会見を開き、金銭の受け取りについて改めて否定しました。 午後2時から福岡市内で開かれた会見で中尾氏は冒頭「私は間違いなく現金1000万円は見ておりません」と述べ、やり取りを録音したとされる音声データにつ...

item.title: For five dizzying weeks this summer, the World Cup took over…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: For five dizzying weeks this summer, the World Cup took over North America, bringing soccer superstars and superfans from around the globe to Canada, the U.S. and Mexico. Here's a look at a summer of soccer.
item.content:encoded: For five dizzying weeks this summer, the World Cup took over North America, bringing soccer superstars and superfans from around the globe to Canada, the U.S. and Mexico. Here's a look at a summer of soccer.

item.content:encoded: Cuba's national electric grid collapses for the third time in July reut.rs/4gDX4qU

item.title: Iran has exercised control over the Strait of Hormuz for mon…
item.author: Newsweek (@newsweek.com)
item.description: Iran has exercised control over the Strait of Hormuz for months, despite the U.S. declaring it open last month.
item.content:encoded: Iran has exercised control over the Strait of Hormuz for months, despite the U.S. declaring it open last month.

item.title: We’ve rounded up the tools, supplies, and other surprisingly…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: We’ve rounded up the tools, supplies, and other surprisingly useful goodies you’ll be glad to have on hand in a pinch. Though they may live in your junk drawer, we promise you they’re anything but junk. nyti.ms/3R4U78c
item.content:encoded: We’ve rounded up the tools, supplies, and other surprisingly useful goodies you’ll be glad to have on hand in a pinch. Though they may live in your junk drawer, we promise you they’re anything but junk. nyti.ms/3R4U78c

item.description: Kemi declares war on net zero – and what remains of her party
item.content:encoded: Kemi declares war on net zero – and what remains of her party

item.title: With a flap of its wings, something resembling a bird dives …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: With a flap of its wings, something resembling a bird dives into the water, swims around and soars back into the skies. But it’s not a bird, it’s a robot — and it could be a big help in studying ocean habitats, researchers said. nyti.ms/4wJfkDX
item.content:encoded: With a flap of its wings, something resembling a bird dives into the water, swims around and soars back into the skies. But it’s not a bird, it’s a robot — and it could be a big help in studying ocean habitats, researchers said. nyti.ms/4wJfkDX

item.title: Josh Grisetti, who appeared in the Broadway musical “Somethi…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: Josh Grisetti, who appeared in the Broadway musical “Something Rotten” and Amazon Prime Video’s “The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel,” had died at 44, his agent confirms.
item.content:encoded: Josh Grisetti, who appeared in the Broadway musical “Something Rotten” and Amazon Prime Video’s “The Marvelous Mrs. Maisel,” had died at 44, his agent confirms.

item.title: As Bastille Day celebrations unfold across France, the polit…

item.description: As Bastille Day celebrations unfold across France, the political class is jittery over far-right leader Marine Le Pen’s jump in poll numbers.

item.title: Economists and chief executives are divided over whether A.I…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Economists and chief executives are divided over whether A.I. is making American workers more productive yet. Zoom out, though, and a quieter trend is hiding in the data.
item.content:encoded: Economists and chief executives are divided over whether A.I. is making American workers more productive yet. Zoom out, though, and a quieter trend is hiding in the data.

item.title: #🔖政治と経済 与党、条文起草委見送り 衆院憲法審、中道の反発強く：時事ドットコム 与党、条文起草委見送り 衆院憲法…
item.author: はてなブックマーク 人気エントリー (@hatena-bookmark.bsky.social)
item.description:
#🔖政治と経済
与党、条文起草委見送り　衆院憲法審、中道の反発強く：時事ドットコム

与党、条文起草委見送り　衆院憲法審、中道の反発強く 時事通信 政治部2026年07月14日16時33分配信 衆院憲法審査会の幹事懇談会に出席する幹事ら＝１４日午前、国会内 衆院憲法審査会は１４日の幹事懇談会で、１６日に審査会を開いて今国会の議論を振り返る総括的な討議を行うことを決めた。今国会は１７日に会期末を迎...
item.content:encoded:
#🔖政治と経済
与党、条文起草委見送り　衆院憲法審、中道の反発強く：時事ドットコム

与党、条文起草委見送り　衆院憲法審、中道の反発強く 時事通信 政治部2026年07月14日16時33分配信 衆院憲法審査会の幹事懇談会に出席する幹事ら＝１４日午前、国会内 衆院憲法審査会は１４日の幹事懇談会で、１６日に審査会を開いて今国会の議論を振り返る総括的な討議を行うことを決めた。今国会は１７日に会期末を迎...

item.title: Migrants at ICE's Delaney Hall facility in Newark have compl…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Migrants at ICE's Delaney Hall facility in Newark have complained about unsafe meals, dirty living quarters and bad medical care. We reviewed documents that provide the first documented evidence of the conditions inside.
item.content:encoded: Migrants at ICE's Delaney Hall facility in Newark have complained about unsafe meals, dirty living quarters and bad medical care. We reviewed documents that provide the first documented evidence of the conditions inside.

item.title: Taco Bell said it removed some ingredients at select restaur…
item.author: Bloomberg News (@bloomberg.com)
item.description: Taco Bell said it removed some ingredients at select restaurants as a precaution amid an outbreak of a parasite that causes severe diarrhea that’s sweeping the US
item.content:encoded: Taco Bell said it removed some ingredients at select restaurants as a precaution amid an outbreak of a parasite that causes severe diarrhea that’s sweeping the US

item.title: President Trump says that he is aware of conspiracy theories…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: President Trump says that he is aware of conspiracy theories circulating about the sudden death of his friend and ally, Sen. Lindsey Graham, but declared “the FBI is wasting their time” investigating the matter.
item.content:encoded: President Trump says that he is aware of conspiracy theories circulating about the sudden death of his friend and ally, Sen. Lindsey Graham, but declared “the FBI is wasting their time” investigating the matter.

item.title: FIFA, accused of charging high prices for this year’s tourna…
item.author: NBC News (@nbcnews.com)
item.description: FIFA, accused of charging high prices for this year’s tournament in the U.S., is selling the grass that will be used for the July 19 final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey at $450 per piece.
item.content:encoded: FIFA, accused of charging high prices for this year’s tournament in the U.S., is selling the grass that will be used for the July 19 final at MetLife Stadium in New Jersey at $450 per piece.

item.title: “The Catcher in the Rye,” turns 75 this week. The influence …
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: “The Catcher in the Rye,” turns 75 this week. The influence of its wised-up yet winningly innocent hero, Holden Caulfield, keeps it among the Great American Novels, our critic writes.
item.content:encoded: “The Catcher in the Rye,” turns 75 this week. The influence of its wised-up yet winningly innocent hero, Holden Caulfield, keeps it among the Great American Novels, our critic writes.

item.title: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Ju…
item.author: The New York Times (@nytimes.com)
item.description: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Justice Department's No. 2 official — in President Trump’s retribution push. It will likely be a flashpoint in Blanche's hearing to be attorney general on Wednesday.
item.content:encoded: Emails from 2025 show the role of Todd Blanche — then the Justice Department's No. 2 official — in President Trump’s retribution push. It will likely be a flashpoint in Blanche's hearing to be attorney general on Wednesday.
